text.title: Freelancer Personal CRM (Minimal) Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Freelancer Personal CRM (Minimal).

example.scenario: Solo freelancer with 15 active prospects + 4 active clients. Notion table, 11 fields, 6 stages; Friday 30-min review surfaces 3 stale leads (archive), 2 'qualified' ready for proposal, 1 churn signal (active client missed call twice).
